title: arenaria retusa subsp. retusa
intro: Arenaria retusa subsp. retusa, also known as lesser sandwort, is a small, succulent perennial plant in the carnation family that is native to Europe and western Asia. The medicinal properties of Arenaria retusa subsp. retusa lie in its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent. This plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Arenaria retusa subsp. retusa is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
